action_boundary: May the operator execute this Banking / KYC / AML controls action now? Action: PEP account activation before EDD signoff. Boundary: activation cannot happen on PEP screen alone.

records.content: Policy rule for Banking / KYC / AML controls: execution may proceed only when current source records close the exact requested action boundary. Communication text cannot override source-control records.
